purpose: Explain how source synthetic personas are normalized into FinMate P0 demo seed values.

policy.sourcePersonaRole: Source personas provide persona character and transaction context.
policy.seedRole: Seed JSON provides normalized execution data for stable P0 screens and calculations.
policy.copyPolicy: Do not copy the full source dataset into this repository.

items.reason: The 7-minute demo needs simple monthly income, spending, saving, and emergency-fund figures while preserving the low-saving baseline persona.

fixedCostRatio.note: Not present as a raw source feature; fixed for the P0 screen/API contract.

cashLikeAssets.note: Not present as a raw source feature; fixed for the P0 simulation.

monthlyEssentialSpending.note: Not present as a raw source feature; fixed so emergencyFundMonths is explainable.

emergencyFundMonths.note: Calculated from FinMate seed cashLikeAssets / monthlyEssentialSpending.

items.reason: The privacy preview reuses the demo user's P001 direction but keeps the portfolio as MOCK_MYDATA with masked fields.
The peer card uses P003's early-career emergency-fund routine direction while normalizing values for a simple 1:1 comparison.

fixedCostRatio.note: Not present as a raw source feature; fixed for the P0 screen/API contract.

cashLikeAssets.note: Not present as a raw source feature; fixed for the P0 comparison.

monthlyEssentialSpending.note: Not present as a raw source feature; fixed so emergencyFundMonths is explainable.

emergencyFundMonths.note: Calculated from FinMate seed cashLikeAssets / monthlyEssentialSpending.
